---
title: "Doc AI Museum: Room 1"
subtitle: "Templates, Registration, and OCR"
resources:
  - assets/room1/*
format:
  html:
    toc: false
page-layout: full
---

[Back to the post](../index.qmd)

This room shows why early document AI systems could work well on narrow document families, and why they broke so easily. The workflow is simple: register the incoming scan against a template, crop expected field regions, and run OCR on those regions.

The failure mode is not abstract. A template stack can still look solid after registration succeeds. What breaks next is usually the fixed crop plus OCR step, especially on small fields and multiline content.

The assets here come from a real offline generator in the same folder: synthetic employment-application forms, feature-based image matching, DocTR OCR, and a hybrid corruption pipeline that simulates print defects, paper defects, geometry drift, and capture artifacts.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## What To Try

- Start on `Clean`. The full pipeline works.
- Click `Rotation`. Registration still succeeds and extraction stays correct.
- Click `JPEG` or `Marked-up form`. Matching still works, but OCR starts degrading.
- Click a field card, especially `ZIP code` or `Street address`, and inspect the crop that OCR actually saw.
:::

<div class="room1-shell">
  <section class="room1-toolbar">
    <div class="room1-toolbar-copy">
      <h2>Choose A Corruption Profile</h2>
      <p>These presets are precomputed. The room is showing real registration and OCR outputs, not a browser simulation.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="room1-presets" id="room1-presets"></div>
  </section>

  <section class="room1-status">
    <div class="room1-status-main">
      <h2 id="room1-profile-title">Clean</h2>
      <p id="room1-profile-description">No corruption.</p>
      <p id="room1-diagnosis" class="room1-diagnosis"></p>
    </div>
    <div class="room1-badges" id="room1-badges"></div>
  </section>

  <div class="room1-stage">
    <section class="room1-panel">
      <header>
        <h3>Incoming Document</h3>
        <p>The observed form after corruption. This is the image fed into matching.</p>
      </header>
      <img id="room1-incoming" alt="Incoming corrupted form" />
    </section>

    <section class="room1-panel">
      <header>
        <h3>Registered To Template</h3>
        <p>Feature matching aligns the page to the template. Crop boxes live in this coordinate system.</p>
      </header>
      <canvas id="room1-registered" width="700" height="900"></canvas>
    </section>

    <section class="room1-panel room1-focus">
      <header>
        <h3>Selected Field</h3>
        <p id="room1-focus-copy">Click a field card to inspect the OCR crop and output.</p>
      </header>
      <div class="room1-focus-body">
        <img id="room1-crop" alt="Selected OCR crop" />
        <div class="room1-focus-meta">
          <h4 id="room1-focus-label">ZIP code</h4>
          <dl>
            <div>
              <dt>Expected</dt>
              <dd id="room1-focus-expected"></dd>
            </div>
            <div>
              <dt>OCR output</dt>
              <dd id="room1-focus-ocr"></dd>
            </div>
          </dl>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>

  <section class="room1-results">
    <header>
      <h2>Field Extraction</h2>
      <p>Small fields and cramped multiline fields fail before the whole page looks obviously broken.</p>
    </header>
    <div class="room1-grid" id="room1-grid"></div>
  </section>

  <details class="room1-advanced">
    <summary>Advanced View</summary>
    <div class="room1-advanced-body">
      <label class="room1-toggle">
        <input id="room1-show-registered" type="checkbox" checked />
        <span>Show registered image</span>
      </label>
      <label class="room1-toggle">
        <input id="room1-show-boxes" type="checkbox" checked />
        <span>Show crop boxes</span>
      </label>
      <pre id="room1-profile-json"></pre>
    </div>
  </details>
</div>

<style>
.room1-shell {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  display: grid;
  gap: 1.3rem;
}

.room1-toolbar,
.room1-status,
.room1-results,
.room1-advanced,
.room1-panel {
  border: 1px solid #d7ccb4;
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: #fffdf7;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(43, 31, 7, 0.06);
}

.room1-toolbar {
  padding: 1rem 1.2rem 1.2rem;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fffef8, #f5efe0);
}

.room1-toolbar-copy h2,
.room1-status-main h2,
.room1-results header h2 {
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
  font-size: 1.08rem;
}

.room1-toolbar-copy p,
.room1-status-main p,
.room1-results header p,
.room1-panel header p {
  margin: 0;
  color: #5a533f;
  font-size: 0.93rem;
}

.room1-presets {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.room1-preset {
  border: 1px solid #cbbd9f;
  background: #fff9ec;
  color: #332b1d;
  padding: 0.55rem 0.8rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}

.room1-preset.active {
  background: #332b1d;
  color: #fff8e8;
  border-color: #332b1d;
}

.room1-status {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
  align-items: start;
}

.room1-diagnosis {
  margin-top: 0.6rem !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #413828 !important;
}

.room1-badges {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.room1-chip {
  padding: 0.35rem 0.65rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.room1-chip.good {
  background: #d9f5dd;
  color: #195126;
}

.room1-chip.warn {
  background: #fff0c9;
  color: #6d4f00;
}

.room1-chip.fail {
  background: #ffd9d6;
  color: #7a1f18;
}

.room1-stage {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.25rem;
}

.room1-panel {
  padding: 1rem;
  background: #fbf7ec;
}

.room1-panel header h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.3rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.room1-panel img,
.room1-panel canvas {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #f0ead9;
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
}

.room1-focus-body {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.9rem;
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
}

.room1-focus img {
  border: 1px solid #dfd2b6;
  background: white;
}

.room1-focus-meta h4 {
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.room1-focus-meta dl {
  margin: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.65rem;
}

.room1-focus-meta dt,
.room1-card dt {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  color: #6a634d;
}

.room1-focus-meta dd,
.room1-card dd,
#room1-profile-json {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}

.room1-results {
  padding: 1rem;
}

.room1-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(230px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.room1-card {
  border: 1px solid #d7ccb4;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 0.9rem;
  background: #fffaf0;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.room1-card.active {
  border-color: #8b6942;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(139, 105, 66, 0.16);
}

.room1-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem;
  font-size: 0.98rem;
}

.room1-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.22rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
}

.room1-badge.clean {
  background: #d9f5dd;
  color: #195126;
}

.room1-badge.fail {
  background: #ffd9d6;
  color: #7a1f18;
}

.room1-card dl {
  margin: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.45rem;
}

.room1-note {
  color: #5a533f;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

.room1-advanced {
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
}

.room1-advanced summary {
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.room1-advanced-body {
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.9rem;
}

.room1-toggle {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  padding: 0.55rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(98, 73, 30, 0.08);
  width: fit-content;
}

#room1-profile-json {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  background: #fbf7ec;
  border: 1px solid #dfd2b6;
  padding: 0.9rem;
  border-radius: 14px;
  overflow-x: auto;
}
</style>

<script>
(() => {
  const presetContainer = document.getElementById("room1-presets");
  const incomingImage = document.getElementById("room1-incoming");
  const registeredCanvas = document.getElementById("room1-registered");
  const registeredCtx = registeredCanvas.getContext("2d");
  const cropImage = document.getElementById("room1-crop");
  const profileTitle = document.getElementById("room1-profile-title");
  const profileDescription = document.getElementById("room1-profile-description");
  const diagnosis = document.getElementById("room1-diagnosis");
  const badges = document.getElementById("room1-badges");
  const grid = document.getElementById("room1-grid");
  const profileJson = document.getElementById("room1-profile-json");
  const showRegistered = document.getElementById("room1-show-registered");
  const showBoxes = document.getElementById("room1-show-boxes");
  const focusCopy = document.getElementById("room1-focus-copy");
  const focusLabel = document.getElementById("room1-focus-label");
  const focusExpected = document.getElementById("room1-focus-expected");
  const focusOcr = document.getElementById("room1-focus-ocr");

  const state = {
    manifest: null,
    currentVariant: null,
    selectedFieldId: "zip",
    imageCache: new Map()
  };

  function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value)
      .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
      .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
      .replaceAll(">", "&gt;");
  }

  function assetPath(relativePath) {
    return `assets/room1/${relativePath}`;
  }

  function loadImage(src) {
    if (state.imageCache.has(src)) return state.imageCache.get(src);
    const promise = new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const image = new Image();
      image.onload = () => resolve(image);
      image.onerror = reject;
      image.src = src;
    });
    state.imageCache.set(src, promise);
    return promise;
  }

  function fieldById(id) {
    return state.currentVariant.fields.find((field) => field.id === id) || state.currentVariant.fields[0];
  }

  function templateFieldById(id) {
    return state.manifest.template.fields.find((field) => field.id === id);
  }

  function diagnosisText(variant) {
    if (variant.id === "clean") {
      return "On a stable form, registration plus fixed crops and OCR can work surprisingly well.";
    }
    if (variant.all_fields_correct) {
      return "Matching still succeeds and the fixed crops stay usable. This is why template stacks survived for years in narrow workflows.";
    }
    if (variant.registration.ok) {
      return "Registration still works, but OCR on fixed crops is now the bottleneck. Small fields and cramped multiline text fail first.";
    }
    return "The page no longer registers cleanly enough for the template to stay trustworthy.";
  }

  function badgeMarkup(variant) {
    const goodFields = variant.fields.filter((field) => field.correct).length;
    const totalFields = variant.fields.length;
    const statusClass = variant.all_fields_correct ? "good" : variant.registration.ok ? "warn" : "fail";
    return [
      `<span class="room1-chip ${variant.registration.ok ? "good" : "fail"}">registration ${variant.registration.ok ? "ok" : "failed"}</span>`,
      `<span class="room1-chip ${statusClass}">${goodFields}/${totalFields} fields correct</span>`,
      `<span class="room1-chip ${variant.registration.inlier_ratio >= 0.75 ? "good" : variant.registration.inlier_ratio >= 0.5 ? "warn" : "fail"}">inlier ratio ${(variant.registration.inlier_ratio * 100).toFixed(0)}%</span>`
    ].join("");
  }

  function drawRegisteredView() {
    const variant = state.currentVariant;
    const selectedField = fieldById(state.selectedFieldId);
    const fieldBoxes = state.manifest.template.fields;
    const baseImagePath = showRegistered.checked && variant.registration.ok
      ? assetPath(`generated/variants/${variant.id}-registered.png`)
      : assetPath(variant.image);

    loadImage(baseImagePath).then((image) => {
      registeredCtx.clearRect(0, 0, registeredCanvas.width, registeredCanvas.height);
      registeredCtx.drawImage(image, 0, 0, registeredCanvas.width, registeredCanvas.height);

      if (!showBoxes.checked) return;
      fieldBoxes.forEach((field) => {
        const active = selectedField && selectedField.id === field.id;
        const current = variant.fields.find((item) => item.id === field.id);
        const [x, y, w, h] = field.box;
        registeredCtx.save();
        registeredCtx.lineWidth = active ? 4 : 2.5;
        registeredCtx.strokeStyle = active
          ? "#7a1f18"
          : current && current.correct
            ? "#27934b"
            : "#b0602d";
        registeredCtx.strokeRect(x, y, w, h);
        registeredCtx.fillStyle = "rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.92)";
        registeredCtx.fillRect(x, y - 22, 122, 18);
        registeredCtx.fillStyle = "#312814";
        registeredCtx.font = "600 12px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif";
        registeredCtx.fillText(field.label, x + 6, y - 8);
        registeredCtx.restore();
      });
    });
  }

  function renderFieldFocus() {
    const field = fieldById(state.selectedFieldId);
    cropImage.src = assetPath(field.crop);
    focusLabel.textContent = field.label;
    focusExpected.textContent = field.expected;
    focusOcr.textContent = field.ocr_text || "No text recovered";
    focusCopy.textContent = field.correct
      ? "This crop still gives OCR enough signal to recover the field."
      : "This crop is where the pipeline starts to break. Registration may still be fine while OCR becomes unreliable.";
  }

  function renderFieldCards() {
    const variant = state.currentVariant;
    grid.innerHTML = "";
    variant.fields.forEach((field) => {
      const card = document.createElement("article");
      card.className = `room1-card${field.id === state.selectedFieldId ? " active" : ""}`;
      card.innerHTML = `
        <h3>${escapeHtml(field.label)}</h3>
        <span class="room1-badge ${field.correct ? "clean" : "fail"}">${field.correct ? "Correct" : "Failed"}</span>
        <dl>
          <div>
            <dt>Expected</dt>
            <dd>${escapeHtml(field.expected)}</dd>
          </div>
          <div>
            <dt>OCR output</dt>
            <dd>${escapeHtml(field.ocr_text || "No text recovered")}</dd>
          </div>
        </dl>
        <div class="room1-note">Click to inspect the actual OCR crop.</div>
      `;
      card.addEventListener("click", () => {
        state.selectedFieldId = field.id;
        render();
      });
      grid.appendChild(card);
    });
  }

  function renderPresetButtons() {
    presetContainer.innerHTML = "";
    state.manifest.variants.forEach((variant) => {
      const button = document.createElement("button");
      button.type = "button";
      button.className = `room1-preset${state.currentVariant.id === variant.id ? " active" : ""}`;
      button.textContent = variant.id === "combo"
        ? "Everything goes wrong"
        : variant.id === "lines"
          ? "Marked-up form"
          : variant.id[0].toUpperCase() + variant.id.slice(1);
      button.addEventListener("click", () => {
        state.currentVariant = variant;
        if (!variant.fields.some((field) => field.id === state.selectedFieldId)) {
          state.selectedFieldId = variant.fields[0].id;
        }
        render();
      });
      presetContainer.appendChild(button);
    });
  }

  function render() {
    const variant = state.currentVariant;
    if (!variant) return;

    profileTitle.textContent = variant.id === "combo"
      ? "Everything Goes Wrong"
      : variant.id === "lines"
        ? "Marked-up Form"
        : variant.id[0].toUpperCase() + variant.id.slice(1);
    profileDescription.textContent = variant.description;
    diagnosis.textContent = diagnosisText(variant);
    badges.innerHTML = badgeMarkup(variant);
    incomingImage.src = assetPath(variant.image);
    profileJson.textContent = JSON.stringify(variant.profile, null, 2);

    renderPresetButtons();
    renderFieldCards();
    renderFieldFocus();
    drawRegisteredView();
  }

  [showRegistered, showBoxes].forEach((element) => {
    element.addEventListener("change", render);
  });

  async function init() {
    const response = await fetch("assets/room1/generated/room1-manifest.json");
    state.manifest = await response.json();
    state.currentVariant = state.manifest.variants.find((variant) => variant.id === "clean") || state.manifest.variants[0];
    state.selectedFieldId = "zip";
    render();
  }

  init().catch((error) => {
    diagnosis.textContent = "Failed to load Room 1 assets.";
    console.error(error);
  });
})();
</script>
